emails.subject: invoices
emails.body: Please do what you can to find out what is going on. I know you forwarded these to Carolyn, but I would still appreciate it if you could investigate, or ask Carolyn to do so. Kay Forwarded by Kay Mann/Corp/Enron on 01/14/2001 08:04 AM "Boyd J. Springer" <bjspringer@JonesDay.com> on 01/12/2001 01:22:11 PM

emails.subject: invoices
emails.body: invoices never received a pass word.

emails.subject: Re: invoices
emails.body: When I was at the site it said that it had sent a new password to me at kay.mann@enron.com. Didn't get here. I give up. From: Suzanne Adams@ECT on 05/25/2001 09:21 AM

emails.subject: Re: invoices
emails.body: Do you have your HROnline password? Do you use it? Kay Mann@ENRON 05/25/2001 09:24 AM

emails.subject: Re: invoices
emails.body: Do you have your HROnline password? Do you use it? Kay Mann@ENRON 05/25/2001 09:24 AM

emails.subject: Re: invoices
emails.body: Debbie Skinner is sending you a new password. You will use this for HRonline and also IBuyIt. Let me know if you don't get it or it doesn't work. Ok, you are going to have to go to HROnline and change the password to the one she is sending. Wait about 10 minutes or so and then go into payables and try the new password. I have Debbie's number if there are any problems. Kay Mann@ENRON 05/25/2001 09:24 AM

emails.subject: Invoices
emails.body: Invoices Kay, do you or Alice have any invoices in your IBuyIt Inbox? If so, why don't you forward them to me, and I'll do them for you. I don't want to send in these invoices you gave me today until I find out if they are in either of the inboxes. I'd hate to duplicate payments. Thanks!!!!!

emails.subject: RE: Invoices
emails.body: RE: Invoices I only have 4 in my box, and none were the ones I gave you. Thanks! To: Mann, Kay; Wright, Alice

emails.subject: RE: Invoices
emails.body: Can I help you with them in any way? To: Adams, Suzanne; Wright, Alice
